summary: Backend-only testing of Ospitalo MVP (vacation rental guest data tool). Seeded session via Mongo (auth_testing.md playbook), then ran 22 pytest cases covering health, auth, properties CRUD, OCR, check-in submission to all 3 portals (Alloggiati Web, Ross 1000, Imposta di Soggiorno), tourist tax exemption for minors, archive listing, PDF receipt + CSV downloads, and logout. ALL 22 TESTS PASSED.

minor.issue: When OCR provider returns BadRequest (e.g. unsupported image), the endpoint raises HTTP 500 with the raw LiteLLM error message in 'detail'. Functional but leaks provider internals to the client; consider mapping to 422 with a friendlier message.

Logout only invalidates the session if the session_token cookie is present in the request. A Bearer-token-only client cannot logout (the DB row is left dangling until expiry). Consider also checking Authorization header for symmetry with get_current_user.
Returns 200 instead of 201 for resource creation. Minor REST convention deviation.

Age is computed as (arr - bd).days // 365 which ignores leap years and may misclassify guests born exactly on the boundary date. For tax accuracy, use a proper year-difference calculation (e.g. dateutil.relativedelta).

action_items: Map OCR provider failures to a user-friendly 4xx response (e.g. 422 'Immagine non valida') instead of forwarding raw LiteLLM error in a 500.
Make /api/auth/logout also accept Bearer token (parity with get_current_user) so token-based clients can invalidate sessions server-side.
Replace ad-hoc age calculation in imposta_soggiorno with dateutil.relativedelta for accuracy across leap years.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py is a single 661-line file. Once features grow it should be split into routers/ (auth, properties, ocr, checkin, archive) per the >700-line guideline.
alloggiati_web.py uses fake creds and gracefully returns success:false (verified). Good.
Ross1000 csv_manual path is purely client-side and always succeeds with csv_content; this matches the configurable Abruzzo default. Good.
All Mongo queries correctly use {"_id": 0} projection (no ObjectId leak).
Env vars are read without defaults via os.environ[...] (fails fast). Good.
Bearer-token-only logout doesn't invalidate the DB session (cookie-only) — see action item.
test_credentials: No real credentials needed. Test session seeded directly in MongoDB via /app/auth_testing.md playbook (user_sessions + users collections). Each pytest run seeds a unique short-lived session and cleans it up in teardown. EMERGENT_LLM_KEY in /app/backend/.env is used live by OCR endpoint (gpt-5.2 via litellm).
seed_data_creation: Pytest session-scoped fixture creates one user + one session_token in MongoDB and tears down user, sessions, created properties, and created checkins after the run. Properties are prefixed with TEST_ for easy identification.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend pytest suite at /app/backend/tests/test_ospitalo_backend.py covers all critical endpoints and passes 22/22. To re-run: `cd /app && python -m pytest backend/tests/test_ospitalo_backend.py -v --junitxml=/app/test_reports/pytest/pytest_results.xml`. The suite seeds its own auth via Mongo (no UI login needed). Alloggiati Web SOAP intentionally fails auth with fake creds and returns success:false (expected); Ross1000 csv_manual always succeeds with csv_content; tourist tax exemption for under-12 verified (age computed from data_nascita vs data_arrivo).
rca of the issue: N/A — no functional bugs blocking. Only minor improvements noted in action_items.
